title: Explain a social change
subtitle: Use one possible cause carefully.
overview: Module: Native-Style Input and Thinking. B1 Core develops balanced English: stronger stories, clearer opinions, practical writing, conversation repair, native-style input, and confident spoken output.

sections.title: B1 core focus
rows: Social topics need careful language because causes are often complex.
社会话题需要谨慎表达，因为原因常常很复杂。
Useful frame: main idea, key detail, personal reaction, and useful phrase.
实用框架：主要意思、关键细节、个人反应和有用表达。
Explain one possible cause of a social change.
解释一个社会变化的可能原因。
One reason may be that people are busier than before. Another factor could be that many services now expect people to use apps instead of speaking face to face.
一个原因可能是人们比以前更忙。另一个因素可能是现在很多服务希望人们使用 app，而不是面对面交流。

items.en: Social topics need careful language because causes are often complex.
items.zh: 社会话题需要谨慎表达，因为原因常常很复杂。

items.en: Useful frame: main idea, key detail, personal reaction, and useful phrase.
items.zh: 实用框架：主要意思、关键细节、个人反应和有用表达。

items.en: One reason may be that people are busier than before. Another factor could be that many services now expect people to use apps instead of speaking face to face.
items.zh: 一个原因可能是人们比以前更忙。另一个因素可能是现在很多服务希望人们使用 app，而不是面对面交流。

items.en: I can say this slowly first, then again with a more natural rhythm.
items.zh: 我可以先慢速说这句，然后再用更自然的节奏说一遍。

items.en: The goal is not a perfect sentence; the goal is a useful sentence I can actually say.
items.zh: 目标不是完美句子；目标是我真的能说出来的有用句子。

items.en: I will keep the main idea clear and add only the details that help.
items.zh: 我会保持主要意思清楚，只加入有帮助的细节。

items.en: If I get stuck, I can repair the sentence and continue.
items.zh: 如果我卡住了，我可以修正句子并继续说。

items.en: This lesson should become part of my spoken English, not just something I understand.
items.zh: 这节课应该变成我口语的一部分，而不只是我理解的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Explain one possible cause of a social change.
lines.zh: 解释一个社会变化的可能原因。

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: One reason may be that people are busier than before. Another factor could be that many services now expect people to use apps instead of speaking face to face.
lines.zh: 一个原因可能是人们比以前更忙。另一个因素可能是现在很多服务希望人们使用 app，而不是面对面交流。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you say the same idea more simply?
lines.zh: 你能把同一个意思说得更简单吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes. I will keep the key idea, one reason, and one example.
lines.zh: 可以。我会保留核心意思、一个原因和一个例子。

items.en: Explain one possible cause of a social change.
items.zh: 解释一个社会变化的可能原因。

items.en: Make one version about your real life.
items.zh: 做一个关于你真实生活的版本。

items.en: Record it once slowly and once at normal speed.
items.zh: 慢速录一遍，再用正常速度录一遍。

items.en: Listen again and improve one thing: clarity, rhythm, or detail.
items.zh: 再听一遍，并改进一个方面：清晰度、节奏或细节。

items.en: Use the best sentence again tomorrow so it becomes automatic.
items.zh: 明天再次使用最好的句子，让它变得自动化。
